articles.title: 108yo and 103yo WWII veterans meet after more than 80 years

children.content: Two of Australia's oldest veterans served in the same place at the same time during World War II, and after the fighting, both headed home to resume their lives in SA — but the 108-year-old and the 103-year-old had never met until recently.

image.altText: Two elderly men seated at a table set for a lunch with a paper program

articles.title: 'Carry the hope': Thousands gather for Anzac Day service in Canberra

children.content: Prime Minister Anthony Albanese and New Zealand High Commissioner Andrew Needs are among those to gather in Canberra for the 111th anniversary of the Gallipoli landings.

image.altText: The facade of the Australian War Memorial was lit up before dawn on Anzac Day 2026.

articles.title: Ben Roberts-Smith speaks after Anzac Day event in Queensland

children.content: Ben Roberts-Smith shook hands and posed for photos with fellow attendees after the service on the Gold Coast wrapped up.

children.content: Australians paid tribute to those who have served at services and marches, but the solemn mood at Melbourne, Sydney and Perth Dawn Services was interrupted by boos during Welcome to Country addresses. Follow live.

items.title: The disaster that 'shocked' a town and brought worldwide attention

children.content: For a dramatic fortnight, the plight of two miners trapped deep underground in Tasmania's north captivated the world. Twenty years later, the Beaconsfield rescue continues to defy belief.

items.title: James Valentine knew good radio and I was his wide-eyed apprentice

items.title: 'Just do it': Why the gas tax momentum is building for Australia's good
